General.Name: Ernest Borel Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Ernest Borel Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, designs, manufactures, markets, and sells Swiss-made mechanical and quartz premium watches for men and women under the Ernest Borel brand. It is also involved in the assembling and distribution of watches; design, development, and manufacturing of stainless-steel alloy watches and smartwatches cases; distribution of timepieces; and provision of after-sales services. It operates in the People's Republic of China, Vietnam, Hong Kong, Macau, Korea, Southeast Asia, and internationally. The company was founded in 1856 and is headquartered in Le Noirmont, Switzerland. Ernest Borel Holdings Limited operates as a subsidiary of VGB Limited.
General.Address: Rue des Perrières 8, Le Noirmont, Switzerland, 2340
